ai.notes: The form includes a LinkedIn auto-fill button and several dynamic sections (cards) that are parsed. The EEO section is standard for Lever applications.

fields.question: Have you previously worked in customer-facing roles where you provided troubleshooting support?

To better understand your experience and expectations, please take a moment to complete this brief multiple-choice form. We highly recommend taking the time to do this: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScX-5Pgfey7hXKhW8GBhUY7WIX4uXr4MOkoOWWy28Xqg2drOQ/viewform
Can you work 9-6 pm EST? (Or if remote, equivalent from your time zone - i.e 8-5 pm cst)
Will you now or in the future require sponsorship to work for an employer in the US?
options: No - I do not/will not require sponsorship, and I am authorized to work for any employer in the US

fields.question: If you currently require sponsorship (or will require sponsorship in the future), please include: 1. The type of visa or sponsorship you currently have (or will require in the future). 2. The timing of when you will require sponsorship. 3. Any additional information that Aircall may need to know in determining whether or not we will be able to provide sponsorship.
What is your desired salary (annually)? If your target number includes bonuses/commissions, please specify the breakdown.
What is most exciting to you about this role?
Why would we be excited to work with you?
What city/state will you be working remotely from?
Are you a permanent resident of one of our approved hiring states listed in the job description? AZ, DC, FL, GA, IL, MA, MI, NC, NJ, OH, SC, TX, or WI.
Race
options: Black or African American (Not Hispanic or Latino)
Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander (Not Hispanic or Latino)
American Indian or Alaska Native (Not Hispanic or Latino)
Two or More Races (Not Hispanic or Latino)
